rationale: Fresh validator re-read TASK-078 implementation build, task context, graph/validation/alignment specs, source code, and alignment smoke tests from repository files. Semantic checks match acceptance: graph output separates canonical source refs, audit evidence, content proof refs, and validation attestations; reconciliation covers downstream documentation/planning/implementation/test/validation/publication-proof gaps for active work; closed-task fail/block validations do not route current drift; tests cover green-vs-drift and content-proof precedence. Updated validation policy permits dirty pre-commit implementation proof when fresh_context=true, clean state is recorded, and working_tree_digest/worktree_digest identifies checked content; checks passed under that posture.
